---
format:
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: white
    width: 1100
    height: 700
    margin: 0.04
    center: true
    controls: false
    progress: false
    css: style.css
engine: knitr
pagetitle: "Interactive privacy / decision diagram"
---

## Privacy game {.hidden-title}

{{< include diagram.qmd >}}
